Know More DERMATOSURGERY Dermatosurgery is the practice of dermatology specializing in surgical procedures and minimally invasive treatments to improve the health and appearance of skin.A careful skin examination is done by Dr. Shilpi Bansal before deciding for any surgery. Surgery is done under local anaesthesia and mild sedation may be given if deemed necessary. A complete history taking and systemic examination is done before the surgery to know about the allergies, comorbidities and any other illness prior to the surgery preventing any untoward event. Know More SKIN CARE Having a clear, bright and glowing skin is everyone’s desire and dream today. Dr Shilpi Bansal and her team at Elite Clinic work together to fulfil those desires and dreams. Our skin care services are designed to help you get rid of all your skin issues. AYURVEDIC In Sanskrit, Ayurveda means “The Science of Life.” It is often called the “Mother of All Healing.” Ayurveda reminds us that health is the balanced and dynamic integration between our environment, body, mind, and spirit. Ayurveda describes three fundamental energies that govern our inner and outer environments which are known in Sanskrit as Vata (Wind), Pitta (Fire), and Kapha (Earth). Everyone inherits a unique mix of these three doshas. It’s believed that all the health issues of an individual are linked to the balance of these doshas.
